extensionDescription.message: AI-powered UX audit in your browser. Evaluate any page with synthetic user profiles and Nielsen's 10 heuristics using local AI.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome Web Store and extensions page

tabScan.description: Tab label for the scan panel

tabReport.description: Tab label for the report panel

tabSettings.description: Tab label for the settings panel

analyzePage.description: Main CTA button to start page analysis

scanning.description: Status shown while scanning is in progress

analyzing.description: Status shown while AI analysis is in progress

overallScore.description: Label for the overall UX score

copyMarkdown.description: Button to copy report as Markdown text

ollamaEndpoint.description: Settings label for Ollama server URL

ollamaModel.description: Settings label for AI model selection

noReportYet.message: No report yet. Go to the Scan tab to analyze a page.
noReportYet.description: Placeholder shown when no report is available

evaluatingProfile.description: Progress status showing current profile being evaluated

evaluatingHeuristic.description: Progress status showing current heuristic being evaluated
